reason: tests need rewrite, not instruction: (1) tests_verify_behavior_not_text fails — all fail-to-pass tests are pure string/regex matching on exact variable names, type annotations, and code patterns rather than testing behavior; (2) this makes behavior_in_task_description irreconcilable with no_solution_leakage since the asserted specifics are code implementation details that cannot be specified without leaking the solution; (3) solution_uniqueness_guard fails because only one exact code pattern passes the string-match tests; (4) additionally, the base Docker image already contains the gold solution code (commit 411f76989 includes handleCustomCssChange/originalCss/cssDebounceTimer in PropertiesModal), making nop=0 impossible regardless of instruction changes
